profile.name: Sonal Mittal
profile.summary: Full Stack Engineer with hands-on experience in Next.js, Node.js, Django, and MongoDB, with deep integration of LLMs, LangChain, and Generative AI into production systems.
profile.status: Open to full-time software engineering and AI/ML opportunities.

projects.title: AI Second Brain
projects.summary: An AI-powered knowledge system with semantic search, note retrieval, and PDF processing for context-aware answers.
projects.impact: Turned personal documents and notes into a searchable, assistant-style interface with grounded responses.

projects.title: LinkedIn Post Generator
projects.summary: An end-to-end LLM content workflow that generates polished LinkedIn drafts using chained prompts.
projects.impact: Reduced manual drafting effort by 60 percent while keeping the workflow easy to refine.

projects.title: Learning Platform
projects.summary: A full-stack learning platform built for 500 plus users with object detection and voice features.
projects.impact: Improved usability and speed while expanding the learning experience with AI-assisted capabilities.

projects.title: Production APIs at Akoode
projects.summary: Production-facing platform work spanning frontend delivery, API optimization, and AI feature integration.
projects.impact: Reduced response latency by 20 percent and supported stronger delivery velocity across projects.

experience.summary: Leading delivery across multiple projects with a focus on scalable architecture, API quality, and AI-enabled product features.
bullets: Led SDLC for multiple projects using Next.js, Node.js, and MongoDB.
Optimized Django and Flask APIs, reducing response latency by 20 percent.
Improved team performance by 30 percent through stronger architectural decisions.
